channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe hold off Bangladesh for 25-run victory @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: More buses deployed as thousands of Zimbabweans and Malawians await repatriation at Musina border
item.description: By Simon Majadibodu l IOL THE Department of Home Affairs says at least 50 buses are expected to arrive at the Musina Repatriation Centre to help clear a growing backlog as thousands of Zimbabwean and Malawian nationals wait to return home. The move comes as anti-migrant organisat via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shocking Insider Revelation: Thoma Mapfumo’s Closest Allies Reveal What He will Do as Chivayo Offers Him US$1.5 Million @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Million-Dollar Dilemma: Thomas Mapfumo’s Crossroads Harare – A staggering US$1.5 million offer from controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo has ignited a fervent debate across Zimbabwe, placing legendary Chimurenga musician Thomas Mapfumo, affectionately known as Mukanya, at via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘What shocked me’: Makhadzi responds to Zimbabwe backlash
item.description: The South African South African award-winning musician Makhadzi has responded to accusations from some Zimbabwean social media users who claimed she hates Zimbabweans, saying she was left shocked by the allegations after years of supporting artists from the neighbouring country. via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘What shocked me is when Zim people said l hate them’: Makhadzi responds to backlash
item.description: By Dumani Moyo l The South African SOUTH African award-winning musician Makhadzi has responded to accusations from some Zimbabwean social media users, who claimed she hates Zimbabweans, saying she was left shocked by the allegations after years of supporting artists from the neig via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Sables show character despite defeat in Nations Cup opener
item.description: Tinashe Kusema, Zimbabwe (5) 26 – (19) 36 Tonga EDWARD Sigauke yesterday reminded the rugby world why he is regarded as one of Zimbabwe’s most exciting talents, producing a dazzling... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Bulawayo begins hunt for next Miss Tourism Zimbabwe queen
item.description: Mbulelo Mpofu, BULAWAYO is preparing to crown its next tourism ambassador after registrations officially opened for the Miss Tourism Zimbabwe (MTZ) Bulawayo provincial qualifier. Aspiring contestants have until July... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: South African Hawks deny investigating Wicknell Chivayo as News24 issues apology @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: South Africa’s Hawks have confirmed there is no active investigation into Wicknell Chivayo, while News24 has apologised for incorrectly linking him to a money laundering probe. The post South African Hawks deny investigating Wicknell Chivayo as News24 issues apology appeared firs via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: NPA to recover US$15m from criminal proceeds
item.description: Nyore Madzianike Senior Reporter THE National Prosecuting Authority of Zimbabwe is set to recover nearly US$15 million from criminal proceeds, with top car dealership Mike Harris Toyota (Pvt) Ltd set... via H-metro #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro
